games.name: 7 Wonders Duel
games.description: Two-player civilization card draft over three ages—win by military, science, or points.

games.name: Ark Nova
games.description: Card-driven zoo: build enclosures, adopt animals, sponsors, and conservation appeal.

games.name: Arkham Horror: The Card Game
games.description: Co-op Lovecraft living-card game: build decks and survive evolving campaign scenarios.

games.name: Avalon: Big Box
games.description: Arthurian hidden roles—quest votes, Merlin’s knowledge, assassin’s last shot—plus extras.

games.name: Azul
games.description: Draft factory tiles onto your wall—score patterns, avoid wasted pieces.

games.name: Beast
games.description: One hidden beast vs hunters drafting actions to track, corner, and strike.

games.name: Blood on the Clocktower
games.description: Storyteller-led social deduction: demon and minions hide in a bluffing village.

games.name: Blood Rage
games.description: Vikings draft powers, fight for provinces, and score glory before Ragnarök ends the game.

games.name: Brass: Birmingham
games.description: Industrial euro: canals and rails, coal and iron, timed markets in the Midlands.

games.name: Carcassonne
games.description: Lay landscape tiles and claim cities, roads, and farms with meeples.

games.name: Catan
games.description: Trade, roll resources, build roads and settlements—race to ten victory points.

games.name: Citadels
games.description: Secret role each round—thief, assassin, king—then build the richest city.

games.name: Codenames
games.description: Spymasters clue multiple words; teams avoid the assassin tile.

games.name: Decrypto
games.description: Teams encode secret words so allies get it but rivals intercept your pattern.

games.name: Dominion
games.description: Buy kingdom cards into your deck—the original deck-building race.

games.name: Everdell
games.description: Critters worker-place and play cards through seasons to build a woodland tableau.

games.name: Gaia Project
games.description: Space Terra Mystica: terraform planet types, tech tracks, and area majorities.

games.name: Heat: Pedal to the Metal
games.description: Hand-managed racing: play speed through corners without overheating—first across wins.

games.name: Istanbul
games.description: Wheel a merchant and assistants through the bazaar—first to five rubies wins.

games.name: Kemet
games.description: Ancient Egypt brawl: troops, power tiles, and pyramids for battle VP.

games.name: Kemet: Blood and Sand
games.description: Revised Kemet with new boards, streamlined battles, and refreshed powers.

games.name: KeyForge: Call of the Archons
games.description: Every deck is unique; three Houses race to forge three keys in quick duels.

games.name: KeyForge: Mass Mutation
games.description: KeyForge set with mutations and giants—still one-of-a-kind generated decks.

games.name: Mysterium
games.description: Silent ghost sends vision art; psychics agree on killer, weapon, and room.

games.name: One Night Ultimate Werewolf
games.description: Hidden roles, one round of night powers, then one vote—about ten minutes.

games.name: One Night Ultimate Werewolf: Daybreak
games.description: Standalone one-night werewolf with extra roles for 3–7—same blitz social deduction.

games.name: Paleo
games.description: Co-op stone-age deck: explore, gather, survive story beats to the finish.

games.name: Pandemic
games.description: Co-op treat diseases, trade for cures, and stop outbreaks on the world map.

games.name: Patchwork
games.description: Two-player Tetris-quilt on a time track—best fit and buttons win.

games.name: Puerto Rico
games.description: Role selection drives planting, producing, shipping, and building in the colony.

games.name: The Resistance: Avalon
games.description: Good completes quests; evil sabotages—Merlin knows all but must dodge the assassin.

games.name: Root
games.description: Asymmetric woodland factions—cats, birds, mice, and more—fight for the map.

games.name: Scythe
games.description: 1920s dieselpunk hexes: produce, deploy mechs, battle, and chase secret objectives.

games.name: Spirit Island
games.description: Co-op spirits grow powers to wipe colonists and fear from the land.

games.name: Taco Tajm
games.description: Party roll-and-move: card track of quick silly team challenges.

games.name: Terraforming Mars
games.description: Corporations play cards and tiles to raise oxygen, heat, and oceans on Mars.

games.name: Through the Ages: A New Story of Civilization
games.description: Civ on cards from antiquity forward—tech, military, culture, and leaders.

games.name: Throw Throw Burrito
games.description: Slap down matches, then toss foam burritos—dodgeball meets casual cards.

games.name: Wingspan
games.description: Play birds into habitats—chain food, eggs, and powers for a gentle engine score.
